scripts.edgeone:build: npm run ci && npm run public:prepare -- --channel edgeone-primary --output .edgeone-artifact
scripts.validate: node scripts/build-stage6b-compatible.mjs && node scripts/validate-compatible-active.mjs && node scripts/validate-stage5f.mjs && node scripts/validate-stage5g-compatible-active.mjs && node scripts/validate-stage6a.mjs && node scripts/validate-stage6a-acceptance.mjs && node scripts/validate-stage6b.mjs && npm run release:audit && npm run stage7h:audit && npm run production:validate && npm run production:bootstrap:plan && npm run production:runtime:audit && npm run production:handoff
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm test && npm run validate
